text.title: Ambiguity and Contradiction Detector Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Finding reads 'this is unclear'. Requirements owner asks 'where?'. Cycles wasted.
antipattern.root-cause: Detector returns prose without verbatim citation.
antipattern.fix: Every finding row carries line/section ref + verbatim quote field; pre-merge script blocks rows missing.

antipattern.symptom: 20% of findings tagged 'other'. No remediation pattern emerges.
antipattern.fix: Drop 'other'; force-fit until one of 5 categories applies, or escalate to BA lead.

antipattern.symptom: All findings rated 'medium'. Eng pushes back on the bulk. Real blockers lost in noise.
antipattern.fix: Mandate severity per finding; report ranks by severity first.

antipattern.symptom: Report run 6 months ago referenced; new contradictions ignored.
antipattern.fix: Detector run produces last_reviewed; consumers ignore reports older than 30 days.
